docs_updated.description: Absolute paths to every document updated this stage — spec dir + project-level (README, architecture, design).

spec_dir_files_reviewed.description: Total documents in the spec directory the executor inspected (whether updated or not).

spec_dir_files_updated.description: Subset of spec_dir_files_reviewed that were actually modified.

deviations_documented.description: Spec deviations discovered during implementation/review that this update captured.
